description: Card generation templates - Full bleed, likeness-capturing card art

globalSettings.notes: FULL BLEED = artwork extends edge-to-edge, NO borders, NO frames, NO card UI elements

masterPromptStructure.description: Use this structure for ALL card generations
masterPromptStructure.template: [SUBJECT DESCRIPTION with full likeness details], [RARITY STYLE], [POSE/ACTION], full bleed trading card artwork, edge-to-edge composition, no borders, no card frame, [BACKGROUND], dramatic lighting, ultra detailed, professional TCG illustration, 4k quality

likenessCapture.face: capture exact facial features, eye shape, eye color, nose shape, mouth, skin tone
likenessCapture.body: capture body type, posture, proportions accurately
likenessCapture.clothing: replicate exact outfit details, colors, patterns, accessories
likenessCapture.weapons: match weapon design exactly - shape, color, glow effects, size
likenessCapture.hair: exact hair style, color, length, any highlights or unique features
likenessCapture.distinguishing: scars, tattoos, jewelry, glasses, beard, any unique identifiers

mythic.base: full bleed trading card artwork, edge-to-edge composition, no borders, no card frame
mythic.style: legendary mythic hero, divine radiance, golden aura emanating outward, ethereal glow, god-like presence, breathtaking detail
mythic.lighting: dramatic divine backlighting, golden rim light, volumetric holy rays
mythic.background: epic cosmic void with swirling golden energy, purple nebula, divine particles filling entire frame
mythic.quality: masterpiece illustration, ultra high detail, professional TCG art, 4k, sharp focus
mythic.fullPrompt: [SUBJECT with exact likeness - face, outfit, weapon, all details], legendary mythic hero radiating divine power, golden aura and holy light emanating outward, full bleed trading card artwork edge-to-edge, no borders no frame, epic cosmic purple void background with golden swirling energy and particles, dramatic divine backlighting with golden rim light, masterpiece TCG illustration ultra detailed 4k

legendary.base: full bleed trading card artwork, edge-to-edge composition, no borders, no card frame
legendary.style: powerful legendary warrior, intense elemental aura, commanding presence, highly detailed
legendary.lighting: dramatic side lighting, elemental glow effects, strong shadows
legendary.background: dark gradient with intense colored energy matching element, particles and effects filling frame edge-to-edge
legendary.quality: professional TCG illustration, high detail, sharp, 4k quality
legendary.fullPrompt: [SUBJECT with exact likeness - face, outfit, weapon, all details], powerful legendary warrior with intense elemental aura, full bleed trading card artwork edge-to-edge, no borders no frame, dark gradient background with [ELEMENT] colored energy effects and particles filling entire frame, dramatic side lighting with elemental glow, professional TCG illustration highly detailed 4k

epic.base: full bleed trading card artwork, edge-to-edge composition, no borders, no card frame
epic.style: elite champion in dynamic action, magical energy swirling, battle-ready stance
epic.lighting: dramatic action lighting, magical glow accents
epic.background: purple gradient with magical particles and energy wisps extending to all edges
epic.quality: detailed TCG artwork, professional quality, sharp
epic.fullPrompt: [SUBJECT with exact likeness - face, outfit, weapon, all details], elite champion in dynamic action pose with magical energy, full bleed trading card artwork edge-to-edge, no borders no frame, purple gradient background with magical particles extending to all edges, dramatic action lighting with magical glow, detailed TCG artwork professional quality

rare.base: full bleed trading card artwork, edge-to-edge composition, no borders, no card frame
rare.style: skilled adventurer, confident pose, subtle magical effects
rare.lighting: balanced dramatic lighting, soft magical highlights
rare.background: blue gradient with subtle energy particles filling frame
rare.fullPrompt: [SUBJECT with exact likeness - face, outfit, weapon, all details], skilled adventurer in confident pose with subtle magic, full bleed trading card artwork edge-to-edge, no borders no frame, blue gradient background with subtle particles filling entire frame, balanced dramatic lighting, quality TCG illustration

uncommon.base: full bleed trading card artwork, edge-to-edge composition, no borders, no card frame
uncommon.style: capable warrior or creature, ready stance
uncommon.fullPrompt: [SUBJECT with exact likeness], capable warrior in ready stance, full bleed trading card artwork edge-to-edge, no borders no frame, green gradient background filling entire frame, clean dramatic lighting, TCG artwork style

common.base: full bleed trading card artwork, edge-to-edge composition, no borders, no card frame
common.style: basic creature or character, simple pose
common.fullPrompt: [SUBJECT with exact likeness], basic character or creature, full bleed trading card artwork edge-to-edge, no borders no frame, gray gradient background, standard lighting, simple TCG art style

likenessFromReference.description: When given a reference image, extract and replicate these details
instructions: 2. Note EXACT facial features: eye shape/color, nose, mouth, skin tone, facial hair
3. Note EXACT hair: style, color, length, any unique aspects
4. Note EXACT outfit: all clothing pieces, colors, patterns, materials
5. Note EXACT accessories: weapons, jewelry, glasses, hats, armor pieces
6. Note body type and pose if relevant
7. Note any distinguishing marks: scars, tattoos, etc.
8. Include ALL these details in the generation prompt
likenessFromReference.examplePrompt: Character with white beard, cool pixel sunglasses, brown leather armor with golden trim and buckles, wielding a large golden glowing hammer with yellow energy aura, stocky build, [then add rarity style and full bleed instructions]

cssFrameSystem.description: CSS handles all card frames - NO need to generate frames in images

frameFeatures.common: Simple iron border, subtle glow on hover
frameFeatures.uncommon: Nature green border, top gradient accent
frameFeatures.rare: Crystal blue border, shimmer animation effect
frameFeatures.epic: Animated gradient border, corner particle effects
frameFeatures.legendary: Royal gold animated border, crown icon, golden text
frameFeatures.mythic: Divine flame animated border, multi-color glow, particle effects, pulsing animations
